title: ManageMyServer
description: An open-source plugin for server management.
body:
# ManageMyServer
created by Polokalap

# Features:
- /vanish (buggy as hell, might fix it in future updates) - makes you disappear
- /fly - Makes you fly
- /rlconfig - reloads the config
- /togglechat - disables/enables chat
- /toggleblockbreak - disables/enables block breaking and placing
- /sit - makes you sit
- /discord - sends an invite link, can be configured in config.yml
- /kickall - kicks all players except for you
- /chatlog - logs the chat with a discord webhook
- custom motd - can be turned off / changed in config.yml
- player welcomer - can be changed in config.yml

# FAQ

# Is this open source?

Yes, it is. You can access the source [here](https://github.com/Polokalap/ManageMyServer).

# My plugin isn't working qwq how do I get support?

Join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/74yYfH8KnX) and ping @Polokalap or ask for help in #issues.

# I found a BUG!!!!!!!!!!!

Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/74yYfH8KnX) ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

# I want to help the developer!

You can support me by sharing the plugin with your friends of [buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/Polokalap)
